chatMessage.title: Chat Message
chatMessage.description: A single message in a live chat conversation.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was created.

serviceRecommendation.title: Service Recommendation
serviceRecommendation.description: An AI-generated service recommendation for a client.

recommendedPackage.description: The service package recommended by the AI.

justification.description: The AI's justification for the recommendation.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the recommendation was created.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores individual messages within a chat session.
